CREATE TABLE numbers (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT mod(10, 3) AS remainder1, mod(10.5, 3.7) AS remainder2;
CREATE TABLE subquery_test AS SELECT mod(a, b) AS result FROM numbers WHERE b > 1;
SELECT (SELECT mod(max(a), max(b)) FROM numbers) AS max_remainder FROM numbers;
CREATE TABLE extended_numbers (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT e.id, mod(e.value, n.b) FROM extended_numbers e JOIN numbers n ON e.id = 1 WHERE n.b < 3;
SELECT mod((SELECT avg(value) FROM extended_numbers), 2) AS average_mod;
